meta.purpose: Citation registry for the facts the app surfaces (intake timing, doses, safety reminders). Every fact is attributed to one of these Coimbra Protocol community sources so it reads as a cited reference, never as the app's own medical advice.

disclaimer: Reference only — not medical advice. Everything the app surfaces reflects common Coimbra Protocol practice as described in the sources below. Your own protocol doctor's instructions always take precedence.
sharedBy: Source materials shared for this app by a family member.
copyright: These documents belong to their authors and the Coimbra Protocol community. They are cited here, not reproduced.
